name: fix-memory-leak
system_prompt: You are a systems programmer debugging a memory issue. Be methodical and use evidence from profiling tools.
turns: Good analysis. Walk through the exact reference chain that prevents garbage collection. Draw the object graph.
Fix all the memory leaks. Show the corrected code. Explain the tradeoffs of each fix.
How would you detect this leak in production before it causes an OOM? Show the monitoring setup: what metrics to track, what thresholds to alert on.
Write a test that proves the leak is fixed: create many EventProcessor instances, process events, then verify with gc and sys.getrefcount that instances are collectible.
outcome_description: Response identifies multiple memory leak sources (class-level list, unbounded lru_cache, circular refs in schema) and fixes them
